MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT COOKIES CREATIVE CONSULTING & PROMOTIONS, INC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is denied without prejudice. The motion does not attach the required MC-052 declaration and there is no filed proof of service.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to submit a proposed order usiong the Mandatory Judicial Council form MC-053.
